synopsis:
Issue 4 of 10 of the Marvel comic series Star Wars: Han Solo & Chewbacca.
HARROO! RHOO AAHH! HRRG!!! (TRANSLATION: It's a Chewbacca-centric special issue as Chewie fights to rescue his friend Han.) HRRARRARGH AAHHRA HUGGG! (TRANSLATION: Guest-starring the one-and-only KRRSANTAN!) RRRAHARRR RAAA HRRRA! (TRANSLATION: You don't want to miss this one!)
"
title: Han Solo & Chewbacca #04
